## What & why

## Type
- [ ] New skill
- [ ] Skill improvement (workflow / framework mapping / scripts)
- [ ] Scanner / MCP integration
- [ ] Docs

## Checklist
- [ ] New/changed `SKILL.md` has valid `name` + `description` frontmatter (CI checks this)
- [ ] Framework mappings included where applicable (ATT&CK / NIST / D3FEND / ATLAS)
- [ ] No secrets, payloads-for-malice, or unauthorized-target content
- [ ] Attribution preserved for any vendored/derived content
